name: Apollo's Song
overview: After a tragic mistake leads to his childhood friend’s death, Shougo Chikaishi is cursed by a goddess to fall in love with the same woman in every reincarnation, only to die before they can be together. Trapped in an endless cycle across worlds, he must confront his past and the love he once feared.

trailers.title: 【解禁】主演: 佐藤勝利×髙石あかり 原作:手塚治虫 監督:二宮健 / ドラマイズム『アポロの歌』2/18 START
